name: FlyingChicken
short_description: Two-dimensional (2D) graphics: simple and colorful. Easy to play: control with just one tap, but be careful, every move is recorded! Challenges are fun: levels full of exciting thrills and increasing challenges. Global Competition: Compete and challenge your choices for the highest points!
detailed_description:
Can you drive the flying chicken through obstacles? 🐔✈️

Get ready for an exciting and challenging FlyingChicken experience!

Unleash your skills and help your flying chicken fly safely through amazing obstacles. Every click keeps you flying, and every precise movement can be the difference between victory and loss.

Game Story:

In a world full of obstacles and challenges, a brave chicken named "Vala" decided to break the rules and fly high in the sky. But it's not that easy! Her path is full of difficult obstacles, and the mission depends on you to help her fly safely. Will you be able to lead "Vala" to success and achieve the highest points?
